Localization.Description: Firewall event - packet allowed or denied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}"
The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}"
The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}"
The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}"
The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}"
The transmission of {count.packets} {protocol} packets from host {src.host} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}"
